meaning: 考那斯[苏联立陶宛中南部城市]
examples: Did you know he sawed off the head of the rabbi at Kaunas?
Kaunas, Baltimore, New York and Los Angeles have a dear place in my heart.
I just have to keep on working hard in training and when I get a chance in games like I did against Kaunas.
And Rangers' conquerers Kaunas will face the winner of the second-round match between Aalborg and Modrica.
Kello recently featured in Kaunas' victory over Rangers in the Champions League second qualifying round.
